confirm_delete.title: Are you absolutely sure?
confirm_delete.description: This action is irreversible. This will permanently delete this item and all associated data.
confirm_delete.disclaimer: Yes, I understand that this action is irreversible.

empty_states.expenses_desc: Register your expenses to keep financial control.
empty_states.tenants_desc: Start by registering your frequent customers.
empty_states.bookings_desc: No rentals found matching the filters.
empty_states.providers_desc: Manage your collaborators and their payouts.
empty_states.properties_desc: Register your properties to start managing them.
empty_states.contracts_desc: Your long-term rental contracts will appear here.

navigation.logout_confirm_desc: Are you sure you want to sign out of the system?

tabs_desc.branding: Upload an image of your logo. It will appear on Contracts and PDFs instead of the Regentum logo.
tabs_desc.team: Enable access for your work team. Partners have access to all information. An Operator loads Bookings and Tasks, cannot see financial data.
tabs_desc.owners: From here you enable access to the Owner Portal. Register them with their Google email. The same email must be entered in the property.
tabs_desc.origins: Specify where your tenants come from. It will allow you to orient your business.
tabs_desc.expense_categories: Classify the most common expenses. Taxes, Services, Commissions. All those that do not come from work performed (Tasks).
tabs_desc.task_categories: Classify the most common tasks. Plumbing, Administration, Electricity. It will allow you to keep better control of your property.
tabs_desc.provider_categories: Classify your external collaborators to better organize the team.
tabs_desc.adjustment_categories: Set up manual adjustment types or bonuses for payouts.
tabs_desc.task_scopes: Define general management scopes that do not belong to a specific property.
tabs_desc.currencies: You can select different currencies for your operations. Select the usual ones. The devise base will be taken by default.
tabs_desc.templates: Set up your email templates here to save writing time. Use dynamic markers for personalized information.
tabs_desc.alerts: Adjust the advance notice for check-in and expiration notifications.
tabs_desc.data: Export/Import your data to a backup file.

branding.title: Visual Identity
branding.logo_recom: PNG file with transparent background is recommended.
branding.logo_doc_usage: This logo will be stamped on contracts, receipts, and account settlements.
branding.logo_instr_1: Utilisez le format PNG avec fondo transparente.
branding.logo_instr_3: Ensure good contrast on white background.
branding.commercial_disclaimer: Note: In the commercial version, the main brand of the system remains fixed by service contract.

owners.title: Owners Management
owners.dialog_desc: Register the owner's email so they can access their portal.
owners.email_note: Note: The email must exactly match the one in the 'Owner Email' field of each Property.

categories.expenses_delete_confirm: This category will be deleted. Existing expenses will not be deleted but will remain uncategorized.
categories.providers_delete_confirm: This collaborator category will be deleted.
categories.tasks_delete_confirm: This task category will be deleted.
categories.adjustments_delete_confirm: This payout adjustment category will be deleted.

currencies.title: Currency Settings
currencies.base_desc: It is the main currency for calculations and reports.
currencies.favorites_desc: Select the currencies you use regularly so they appear in the forms.

templates.title: Email Templates
templates.desc: Create predefined messages using dynamic markers.

alerts.title: Alert Settings
alerts.checkin_desc: How far in advance the arrival notice will be shown.
alerts.checkout_desc: How far in advance the departure notice will be shown.
alerts.push_ready: This device is ready to receive alerts.
alerts.push_not_registered: The browser allows notices, but this device is not yet registered on the server. Click the button below.
alerts.push_click_authorize: Click below to authorize notices on this browser.
alerts.push_desc: Receive expiration alerts directly on your screen.

data.title: Data Management
data.export_desc: Download a full copy of your database in JSON format.
data.export_hint: It is recommended to export before mass changes or imports. Only selected categories will be exported.
data.import_desc: Load a backup file to restore or migrate information.
data.import_hint: WARNING! Importing can duplicate records if the file was already loaded.
data.import_confirm_desc: Collections will be processed and new records will be created in your workspace.
data.dependency_warning: Note: Selecting movements (e.g., Bookings) will automatically include their dependencies (e.g., Properties) to maintain integrity.
data.import_progress: Processing Import... Do not close the window.

providers.title: Collaborators
providers.description: Manage external staff who perform work at your properties.

billing.label: Rate
billing.visit_note: Note: The visit rate is configured on each property.

add_dialog.title: Add New Collaborator
add_dialog.description: Fill in the details of the new collaborator to invite them.
add_dialog.name: Name

edit_dialog.title: Edit User
edit_dialog.description: Modify technical details, photos, or access information.

dashboard.title: Home
dashboard.description: A summary of your rental business.

status.no_current_desc: There are no tenants with stays in progress at this time.
status.no_upcoming_desc: There are no entries scheduled in the near future.

alerts.pending_liquidations_desc: You have {{count}} payout(s) with pending balance to collaborators.
alerts.checkins_desc: You have {{count}} check-in(s) in the coming days.
alerts.checkouts_desc: You have {{count}} check-out(s) in the coming days.
alerts.balance_desc: You have {{count}} booking(s) with balance to collect.
alerts.guarantee_solicited_desc: There are {{count}} booking(s) with guarantee requested pending receipt.
alerts.guarantee_received_desc: You have {{count}} completed booking(s) with guarantee pending return.

searcher.title: Availability and Price Search
searcher.desc: Find free properties and calculate the cost of the stay.
searcher.desc_only: Find free properties in a date range.

calculator.title: Payment Calculator
calculator.desc: Calculate a payment for this stay.

welcome_new.title: Welcome to Regentum!
welcome_new.subtitle: To start managing your business, we need to set up your first records.
welcome_new.prop_desc: Register a house or apartment to start loading stays.
welcome_new.prop_hint: Start by loading the technical data of your first unit to enable the calendar.
welcome_new.tenant_desc: Add your frequent customers to speed up bookings.
welcome_new.tenant_hint: Having your frequent tenants registered allows you to create bookings in seconds.

notifications_reminder.title: Don't miss a thing!
notifications_reminder.desc: Enable notifications to receive critical check-in and payment alerts.

properties.title: Properties
properties.up_to_date: Up to date / No pending balances

add_dialog.title: New Property
add_dialog.description: Fill in the details. Press save when finished.

edit_dialog.title: Edit Property
edit_dialog.description: Modify technical data, photos, or owner info.

placeholders.name: e.g. Sea View Apartment
placeholders.owner_notes: Messages or instructions visible to owner...

delete.title: Are you absolutely sure?
delete.desc: This action is irreversible. All data will be deleted.

tenants.title: Tenants
tenants.description: Manage and filter your tenant information.

add_dialog.title: New Tenant
add_dialog.description: Fill in the details. Press save when finished.

tabs_desc.temporary: Manage all temporary rentals for the property here
tabs_desc.blocks: Block dates so your property doesn't appear available
tabs_desc.expenses: Register expenses like listings, commissions, etc.
tabs_desc.payments: Collections are registered from the same booking. Here you see all received.
tabs_desc.liquidations: Generate net account settlements for the owner of this unit.

add_dialog.title: New Temporary Booking
add_dialog.description: Fill in the details to plan the stay.

edit_dialog.title: Edit Booking
edit_dialog.description: Modify stay details or contract status.

email_dialog.title: Send Message to {{name}}
email_dialog.description: Select a template to draft the email.

whatsapp.signature_message: Hi {{name}}, please review and sign the rental contract at this link: {{link}}

contratos.title: Annual Rentals
contratos.description: Tracking long-term lease contracts and monthly installments.

add_dialog.title: New Lease Contract
add_dialog.description: The system will automatically generate all monthly installments.

edit_dialog.title: Edit Contract
edit_dialog.description: Modify the general terms of the agreement.

adjustment_dialog.title: Rent Adjustment
adjustment_dialog.description: Calculate the new fee amount according to the applied index.
adjustment_dialog.note: This change will propagate to all future unadjusted installments.

register_payment_dialog.title: Rent Collection
register_payment_dialog.description: Register the fee payment due on {{date}}.

tasks.title: Tasks & Maintenance
tasks.description: Schedule of pending work in units.

add_dialog.title: New Task
add_dialog.description: Create a maintenance or management task.

expenses.title: Expenses
expenses.description: Full control of outflows and investments.

add_dialog.title: Register New Expense
add_dialog.description: Register an outflow imputed to a property or scope.

delete_dialog.description: This expense record will be removed from accounting.

liquidations.title: Collaborator Payouts
liquidations.description: Manage pending payments to your external team.
liquidations.no_admin_notes: No admin notes for this collaborator.
liquidations.current_balance_desc: Real total balance includes carryover from last payout plus all current pending items.

pending_items.title: Items Pending Payout
pending_items.description: Select work and adjustments to include in this closing.
pending_items.no_items: No pending items in this currency.

revert.title: Revert Payout?
revert.description: Activities and adjustments will become pending again. Registered payments will be deleted.
revert.warning_payments: ATTENTION! This payout already has registered payments.

payment.title: Register Payout Payment
payment.description: Register partial or total payment for the payout of {{date}}.

add_activity_dialog.title: Register Activity - {{name}}
add_activity_dialog.description_mixed: This collaborator bills by hour or visit.
add_activity_dialog.description_hourly: This collaborator bills a fixed hourly rate.
add_activity_dialog.description_visit: This collaborator bills a fixed rate per visit.
add_activity_dialog.description_monthly: This provider bills a fixed monthly rate.

add_adjustment_dialog.title: Add Adjustment - {{name}}
add_adjustment_dialog.description: Register a bonus, advance or manual discount.

owner_liquidations.title: Owner Settlements
owner_liquidations.description: Generate net account settlements for property owners.
owner_liquidations.no_liquidations: No settlements generated for this property.

add_dialog.title: New Account Settlement
add_dialog.description: Select income and expenses to include. The system will calculate your commission automatically.
add_dialog.no_income: No pending collections in this currency.
add_dialog.no_expenses: No pending expenses in this currency.

owner_portal.title: Owner Portal
owner_portal.no_properties_desc: We haven't found any properties associated with your email account. Please contact administration to verify your registration.

reports.description: Detailed analysis of profitability and occupancy.
reports.no_financial_data: No data to show for this period.

monitor.title: Platform Monitor
monitor.subtitle: Global status of all registered organizations.

org_detail.title: Organization Detail
org_detail.desc: Usage and activity statistics for each workspace.

alerts.info_desc: Data is automatically updated with each user action or through manual synchronization.
alerts.privacy_desc: Only numerical counters are displayed. Booking content and personal data are private to each organization.

home.title: Home
home.desc: Here you have a quick summary of your rentals status, critical alerts, and payment calculator.

properties.title: Properties
properties.desc: Manage your houses and apartments. Click on one to see its full details, upload photos, or set up contracts.
properties.continue_desc: Click here to enter the properties section and continue the tour.

tenants.title: Tenants
tenants.desc: Access your customer directory, check their star ratings, and behavioral history.

providers.title: Collaborators
providers.desc: Manage your external team (cleaning, maintenance) and keep track of their work and payments.

bookings.title: Temporary
bookings.desc: Control the daily rental calendar, contract statuses, and pending collections.

contracts.title: Annuals
contracts.desc: Specialized tracking of long-term contracts, monthly payments, and automatic reviews.

tasks.title: Tasks
tasks.desc: Pending maintenance and repair schedule. Keep your units in perfect condition.

payments.title: Recettes
payments.desc: Consultez tous les paiements reçus de vos locataires en un seul endroit.

liquidations.title: Payouts
liquidations.desc: Generate account closings to pay your collaborators transparently.

expenses.title: Expenses
expenses.desc: Register money outflows (taxes, services, commissions) to know your real profitability.

informes.title: Reports
informes.desc: Analyze the profitability, occupancy, and performance of your business with detailed charts.

help.title: Help
help.desc: Consult the user manual, markers for contracts, and frequently asked questions.

settings.title: Settings
settings.desc: Customize your brand, invite your team, set up your currencies, and create email templates.

mobile_menu.title: Extended Menu
mobile_menu.desc: Use this button to access advanced sections like Expenses, Reports, and Settings.

user_menu.title: My Account
user_menu.desc: From here you can change the language, enable dark mode, or switch your profile to 'Owner View'.

property_detail.temporarios_desc: Control bookings, digital contracts, and collections for this property.
property_detail.contratos_desc: Monthly installments and adjustments tracking for fixed tenants.
property_detail.blocks_desc: Close dates for maintenance or personal use. Auto-sync with iCal automatically.
property_detail.calendar_desc: Verify the visual availability of this property.
property_detail.tasks_desc: Manage repairs and cleaning specific to this real estate.
property_detail.expenses_desc: Register direct expenses imputed to this property.
property_detail.liquidations_desc: Generate the net account settlement to send to the owner.

settings_page.branding_desc: Sube tu logo para que aparezca en los contratos y recibos que generes.
settings_page.team_desc: Invita a socios y operadores para que colaboren en la gestión.
settings_page.owners_desc: Habilita el portal para que los propietarios vean su ocupación y descarguen rendiciones.
settings_page.templates_desc: Crea modelos de mensajes personalizados con marcadores dinámicos.
